name: Lobster in Wild Watercress Dressing
recipeInstructions:
-------------------Wild Watercress Dressing-------------------
1. In a food processor or blender, combine chervil, watercress, chopped onion, Chardonnay wine vinegar, egg yolk, olive oil, salt, and freshly ground white pepper.
2. Process until the mixture is emulsified and well combined.
3. Scatter fresh herbs in the bottom of a large saucepan.
4. Add white vermouth to the pan.
5. Place the cooked lobster on top of the herbs and pour over the white vermouth.
6. Cover and bring to a boil.
7. Steam until the lobster is cooked, about 20 to 25 minutes.
8. Remove the lobster from the pan and crack the shells and claws if desired.
9. Pour some wild watercress dressing on a serving platter.
10. Arrange the lobster tail and claws over the dressing.
11. Toss chopped tomatoes, yellow bell pepper, and red bell pepper with the remaining dressing.
12. Place around the lobster.
13. Garnish with additional fresh herbs.
